translations.landing.philosophy.coreBeliefs.principle: The best automation doesn't replace people — it helps them do more. Every feature we build keeps you in control.
If you can't see what happened, you can't trust it. Every action has a record — logs, screenshots, and timestamps.
Your data shouldn't leave your computer. No internet needed, no data sent elsewhere. Complete control over your information.
Runs on Your Computer, Not the Cloud
translations.landing.philosophy.coreBeliefs.subtitle: These principles guide every design decision we make.
translations.landing.philosophy.coreBeliefs.title: Our Core Beliefs
translations.landing.philosophy.finalStatement.descri: Try Flyto2 for free and see the difference.
translations.landing.philosophy.finalStatement.title: Ready to experience the difference?
translations.landing.philosophy.hero.description: Staying in control isn't a limitation — it's the whole point. Knowing what happened at every step isn't a burden — it's the foundation.
translations.landing.philosophy.hero.title: Why We Built Flyto2 Differently
translations.landing.philosophy.humanSteps.belief1.de: Every Flyto2 workflow can pause, let you check, and continue at any step.
translations.landing.philosophy.humanSteps.belief1.ti: The most dangerous automation is the kind you can't stop
translations.landing.philosophy.humanSteps.belief2.de: Human approval steps are a core part of the system, not something added on later.
translations.landing.philosophy.humanSteps.belief2.ti: Approvals should be part of the design, not an afterthought
translations.landing.philosophy.humanSteps.belief3.de: Go back to the last good point, fix the issue, and continue. No need to start everything over.
translations.landing.philosophy.humanSteps.belief4.de: Every action, every decision, every approval is saved and timestamped.
translations.landing.philosophy.humanSteps.belief4.ti: A full record of what happened is not optional
translations.landing.philosophy.humanSteps.title: Why Human Review is a Core Feature
translations.landing.philosophy.notNoCode.flytoApproa: See what happens at every step
Find out why and where things went wrong
Open source core, no strings attached
translations.landing.philosophy.notNoCode.noCodePromi: When it fails, you can't see why
Stuck with one provider's way of doing things
Hits a wall when you need more
translations.landing.philosophy.notNoCode.subtitle: "Easy" tools promise simplicity. But simple isn't always the right answer.
translations.landing.philosophy.notNoCode.title: Why We're Not Just Another "Easy" Tool
translations.landing.philosophy.quote: The goal of automation isn't to replace people. It's to free people to focus on what truly needs human thinking.
